title: README is the unedited mix-generated stub
evidence: README.md:1 — "**TODO: Add description**"; describes a generic hex package, nothing about the MCP server or how to run it
suggestion: Replace with a short description of the MCP server, the tools it exposes, and how to start it (mix run / escript)

title: Dead/over-fitted head_to_head_stats/2 with hardcoded team names
evidence: lib/brazilian_soccer/queries/matches.ex:53-92 builds a result map containing literal :flamengo_wins / :fluminense_wins keys; the live head_to_head tool (mcp/tools.ex:204) computes its own counts and never calls this function
suggestion: Remove the hardcoded Flamengo/Fluminense keys (a TDD test artifact) and route the head_to_head tool through this function, or delete it

title: Tools beyond the spec: biggest_wins, competition_stats, top-N players
evidence: lib/brazilian_soccer/mcp/tools.ex:78-99 (biggest_wins, competition_stats) and players.ex:30 top_rated implement R10 statistical analysis richly, beyond the minimum required
suggestion: None — surfaced as positive coverage of R10
